Class Database

java.lang.Object
database.Database
public class Database extends Object

Title: Database Class.

Description: This is an in-memory database built on H2. Detailed documentation of H2 can be found at https://www.h2database.com/html/main.html (Click on "PDF (2MP) for a PDF of 438 pages on the H2 main page.) This class leverages H2 and provides numerous special supporting methods.

Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025

Version:
2.00 2025-04-29 Updated and expanded from the version produce by on a previous version by Pravalika Mukkiri and Ishwarya Hidkimath Basavaraj, 2.01 2025-12-17 Minor updates for Spring 2026
Author:
Lynn Robert Carter

    Description
    void
    acceptAdminRequest(int id, String username, String notes)
    Accepts an admin request and grants temporary admin status for 24 hours.
    void
    addInvitation(String code)
    Adds a new invitation code to the database.
    void
    burnOTP(String username)
    Burns the OTP immediately after successful login so it can never be used again.
    void
    clearAllMessages()
    Clears all existing direct messages from the database.

    closeConnection()
    Method: void closeConnection()

    connectToDatabase()

    void
    createDirectMessage(String sender, String receiver, String content)
    Creates a direct message between two users.

    createQuestion(String title, String topic, String createdBy)
    Creates a new question.
    void
    createQuestionReply(int questionId, int parentReplyId, String content, String createdBy)
    Creates a reply to a question.
    void
    createReply(int threadId, int parentReplyId, String content, String createdBy)
    Creates a reply to a specific discussion thread.
    void
    createThread(String title, String topic, String createdBy)
    Creates a new discussion thread in the database.
    void
    deleteAllRepliesForQuestion(int questionId)
    Deletes all replies associated with a specific question.
    void
    deleteAllRepliesForThread(int threadId)
    Deletes all replies associated with a specific thread.
    void
    deleteGrade(int replyId)
    Deletes a grade associated with a specific reply.
    void
    deleteInvitation(String code)
    Deletes an invitation code from the database.
    void
    deleteQuestion(int id)
    Permanently deletes a question from the database.
    void
    deleteQuestionReply(int id)
    Permanently deletes a question reply from the database.
    void
    deleteReply(int id)
    Permanently deletes a reply from the database.
    void
    deleteThread(int id)
    Deletes a discussion thread by ID.
    void
    deleteUser(String username)
    Deletes a user from the database.

  • Constructor Details

    • Database

      public Database()

      Method: Database

      Description: The default constructor used to establish this singleton object.

  • Method Details

    • connectToDatabase

      public void connectToDatabase() throws SQLException

      Method: connectToDatabase

      Description: Used to establish the in-memory instance of the H2 database from secondary storage.

      Throws:
      SQLException - when the DriverManager is unable to establish a connection

    • isDatabaseEmpty

      public boolean isDatabaseEmpty()

      Method: isDatabaseEmpty

      Description: If the user database has no rows, true is returned, else false.

      Returns:
      true if the database is empty, else it returns false

    • getNumberOfUsers

      public int getNumberOfUsers()

      Method: getNumberOfUsers

      Description: Returns an integer .of the number of users currently in the user database.

      Returns:
      the number of user records in the database.

    • register

      public void register(User user) throws SQLException

      Method: register(User user)

      Description: Creates a new row in the database using the user parameter.

      Parameters:
      user - specifies a user object to be added to the database.
      Throws:
      SQLException - when there is an issue creating the SQL command or executing it.

    • getUserList

      public List<String> getUserList()
      Generate a List of Strings, one for each user in the database, starting with "<Select User>" at the start of the list.
      Returns:
      a list of userNames found in the database.

    • loginAdmin

      public boolean loginAdmin(User user)

      Method: boolean loginAdmin(User user)

      Description: Check to see that a user with the specified username, password, and role is the same as a row in the table for the username, password, and role.

      Parameters:
      user - specifies the specific user that should be logged in playing the Admin role.
      Returns:
      true if the specified user has been logged in as an Admin else false.

    • loginRole1

      public boolean loginRole1(User user)

      Method: boolean loginRole1(User user)

      Description: Check to see that a user with the specified username, password, and role is the same as a row in the table for the username, password, and role.

      Parameters:
      user - specifies the specific user that should be logged in playing the Student role.
      Returns:
      true if the specified user has been logged in as an Student else false.

    • loginRole2

      public boolean loginRole2(User user)

      Method: boolean loginRole2(User user)

      Description: Check to see that a user with the specified username, password, and role is the same as a row in the table for the username, password, and role.

      Parameters:
      user - specifies the specific user that should be logged in playing the Reviewer role.
      Returns:
      true if the specified user has been logged in as an Student else false.

    • doesUserExist

      public boolean doesUserExist(String userName)

      Method: boolean doesUserExist(User user)

      Description: Check to see that a user with the specified username is in the table.

      Parameters:
      userName - specifies the specific user that we want to determine if it is in the table.
      Returns:
      true if the specified user is in the table else false.

    • getNumberOfRoles

      public int getNumberOfRoles(User user)

      Method: int getNumberOfRoles(User user)

      Description: Determine the number of roles a specified user plays.

      Parameters:
      user - specifies the specific user that we want to determine if it is in the table.
      Returns:
      the number of roles this user plays (0 - 5).

    • generateInvitationCode

      public String generateInvitationCode(String emailAddress, String role)

      Method: String generateInvitationCode(String emailAddress, String role)

      Description: Given an email address and a roles, this method establishes and invitation code and adds a record to the InvitationCodes table. When the invitation code is used, the stored email address is used to establish the new user and the record is removed from the table.

      Parameters:
      emailAddress - specifies the email address for this new user.
      role - specified the role that this new user will play.
      Returns:
      the code of six characters so the new user can use it to securely setup an account.

    • getNumberOfInvitations

      public int getNumberOfInvitations()

      Method: int getNumberOfInvitations()

      Description: Determine the number of outstanding invitations in the table.

      Returns:
      the number of invitations in the table.

    • emailaddressHasBeenUsed

      public boolean emailaddressHasBeenUsed(String emailAddress)

      Method: boolean emailaddressHasBeenUsed(String emailAddress)

      Description: Determine if an email address has been user to establish a user.

      Parameters:
      emailAddress - is a string that identifies a user in the table
      Returns:
      true if the email address is in the table, else return false.

    • getRoleGivenAnInvitationCode

      public String getRoleGivenAnInvitationCode(String code)

      Method: String getRoleGivenAnInvitationCode(String code)

      Description: Get the role associated with an invitation code.

      Parameters:
      code - is the 6 character String invitation code
      Returns:
      the role for the code or an empty string.

    • getEmailAddressUsingCode

      public String getEmailAddressUsingCode(String code)

      Method: String getEmailAddressUsingCode (String code )

      Description: Get the email addressed associated with an invitation code.

      Parameters:
      code - is the 6 character String invitation code
      Returns:
      the email address for the code or an empty string.

    • removeInvitationAfterUse

      public void removeInvitationAfterUse(String code)

      Method: void removeInvitationAfterUse(String code)

      Description: Remove an invitation record once it is used.

      Parameters:
      code - is the 6 character String invitation code

    • getFirstName

      public String getFirstName(String username)

      Method: String getFirstName(String username)

      Description: Get the first name of a user given that user's username.

      Parameters:
      username - is the username of the user
      Returns:
      the first name of a user given that user's username

    • updateFirstName

      public void updateFirstName(String username, String firstName)

      Method: void updateFirstName(String username, String firstName)

      Description: Update the first name of a user given that user's username and the new first name.

      Parameters:
      username - is the username of the user
      firstName - is the new first name for the user

      public String getMiddleName(String username)

      Method: String getMiddleName(String username)

      Description: Get the middle name of a user given that user's username.

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the middle name of a user given that user's username

      Description: Update the middle name of a user given that user's username and the new middle name.

      Parameters:

      middleName - is the new middle name for the user

      Description: Get the last name of a user given that user's username.

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the last name of a user given that user's username

      public void updateLastName(String username, String lastName)

      Method: void updateLastName(String username, String lastName)

      Description: Update the middle name of a user given that user's username and the new middle name.

      Parameters:
      username - is the username of the user
      lastName - is the new last name for the user

      public String getPreferredFirstName(String username)

      Method: String getPreferredFirstName(String username)

      Description: Get the preferred first name of a user given that user's username.

      Parameters:
      username - is the username of the user
      Returns:
      the preferred first name of a user given that user's username

      public void updatePreferredFirstName(String username, String preferredFirstName)

      Method: void updatePreferredFirstName(String username, String preferredFirstName)

      Description: Update the preferred first name of a user given that user's username and the new preferred first name.

      Parameters:
      username - is the username of the user
      preferredFirstName - is the new preferred first name for the user

    • getEmailAddress

      public String getEmailAddress(String username)

      Method: String getEmailAddress(String username)

      Description: Get the email address of a user given that user's username.

      Parameters:
      username - is the username of the user
      Returns:
      the email address of a user given that user's username

    • updateEmailAddress

      public void updateEmailAddress(String username, String emailAddress)

      Method: void updateEmailAddress(String username, String emailAddress)

      Description: Update the email address name of a user given that user's username and the new email address.

      Parameters:
      username - is the username of the user
      emailAddress - is the new preferred first name for the user

    • getUserAccountDetails

      public boolean getUserAccountDetails(String username)

      Method: boolean getUserAccountDetails(String username)

      Description: Get all the attributes of a user given that user's username.

      Parameters:
      username - is the username of the user
      Returns:
      true of the get is successful, else false

    • updateUserRole

      public boolean updateUserRole(String username, String role, String value)

      Method: boolean updateUserRole(String username, String role, String value)

      Description: Update a specified role for a specified user's and set and update all the current user attributes.

      Parameters:
      username - is the username of the user
      role - is string that specifies the role to update
      value - is the string that specified TRUE or FALSE for the role
      Returns:
      true if the update was successful, else false

      public String getCurrentUsername()

      Method: String getCurrentUsername()

      Description: Get the current user's username.

      Returns:
      the username value is returned

    • getCurrentPassword

      public String getCurrentPassword()

      Method: String getCurrentPassword()

      Description: Get the current user's password.

      Returns:
      the password value is returned

      Description: Get the current user's first name.

      Returns:
      the first name value is returned

      public String getCurrentMiddleName()

      Description: Get the current user's middle name.

      Returns:
      the middle name value is returned

      Method: String getCurrentLastName()

      Description: Get the current user's last name.

      Returns:

    • getCurrentPreferredFirstName

      public String getCurrentPreferredFirstName()

      Method: String getCurrentPreferredFirstName(

      Description: Get the current user's preferred first name.

      Returns:
      the preferred first name value is returned

    • getCurrentEmailAddress

      public String getCurrentEmailAddress()

      Method: String getCurrentEmailAddress()

      Description: Get the current user's email address name.

      Returns:
      the email address value is returned

    • getCurrentAdminRole

      public boolean getCurrentAdminRole()

      Method: boolean getCurrentAdminRole()

      Description: Get the current user's Admin role attribute.

      Returns:
      true if this user plays an Admin role, else false

    • getCurrentNewRole1

      public boolean getCurrentNewRole1()

      Method: boolean getCurrentNewRole1()

      Description: Get the current user's Student role attribute.

      Returns:
      true if this user plays a Student role, else false

    • getCurrentNewRole2

      public boolean getCurrentNewRole2()

      Method: boolean getCurrentNewRole2()

      Description: Get the current user's Reviewer role attribute.

      Returns:
      true if this user plays a Reviewer role, else false

    • dump

      public void dump() throws SQLException

      Debugging method

      Description: Debugging method that dumps the database of the console.

      Throws:
      SQLException - if there is an issues accessing the database.

    • closeConnection

      public void closeConnection()

      Method: void closeConnection()

      Description: Closes the database statement and connection.

    • usernameExists

      public boolean usernameExists(String username)
      Checks if a username exists in the database.
      Parameters:
      username - the username to check for existence
      Returns:
      true if the user exists, false otherwise

    • deleteUser

      public void deleteUser(String username) throws SQLException
      Deletes a user from the database.
      Parameters:
      username - the username of the user to delete
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs

    • resetPassword

      public void resetPassword(String username, String newPassword) throws SQLException
      Resets a user's password to a new One-Time Password (OTP) and sets a 24-hour expiration.
      Parameters:
      username - the username of the account to reset
      newPassword - the new One-Time Password to assign to the user
      Throws:
      SQLException - if there is an issue updating the database

    • addInvitation

      public void addInvitation(String code) throws SQLException
      Adds a new invitation code to the database.
      Parameters:
      code - the invitation code to add
      Throws:
      SQLException - if there is an error inserting the code

    • getInvitationCount

      public int getInvitationCount()
      Gets the total number of active invitations.
      Returns:
      the count of active invitations

    • validInvitation

      public boolean validInvitation(String code)
      Checks if a provided invitation code is valid.
      Parameters:
      code - the invitation code to check
      Returns:
      true if the code is valid and exists, false otherwise

    • getInvitationList

      public List<String> getInvitationList()
      Fetches the active invitations as a formatted list for the UI.
      Returns:
      a List of formatted strings representing active invitations

    • deleteInvitation

      public void deleteInvitation(String code) throws SQLException
      Deletes an invitation code from the database.
      Parameters:
      code - the invitation code to delete
      Throws:
      SQLException - if there is a database error

    • isAccountExpired

      public boolean isAccountExpired(String username)
      Checks if an account's OTP has expired using pure Java LONG math to avoid SQL timezone bugs.
      Parameters:
      username - the username to check
      Returns:
      true if the OTP is expired, false otherwise

    • burnOTP

      public void burnOTP(String username)
      Burns the OTP immediately after successful login so it can never be used again.
      Parameters:
      username - the username of the account to modify

    • isUsingOTP

      public boolean isUsingOTP(String username)
      Checks if the user is currently logging in with an active OTP.
      Parameters:
      username - the username to check
      Returns:
      true if the user is using an active OTP, false otherwise

    • updatePassword

      public void updatePassword(String username, String newPassword)
      Updates the user's password and clears the OTP flag so it becomes a standard password again.
      Parameters:
      username - the username whose password to update
      newPassword - the new standard password

    • createThread

      public void createThread(String title, String topic, String createdBy) throws SQLException
      Creates a new discussion thread in the database.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the discussion thread
      topic - the main topic or description of the thread
      createdBy - the username of the person creating the thread
      Throws:
      SQLException - if there is an error accessing or updating the database

    • getThreadList

      public List<String> getThreadList()
      Retrieves a formatted list of discussion threads.
      Returns:
      a List of formatted strings representing threads

    • updateThread

      public void updateThread(int id, String newTitle, String newTopic) throws SQLException
      Updates a thread's content.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the thread
      newTitle - the new title for the thread
      newTopic - the new topic for the thread
      Throws:
      SQLException - if there is a database error

    • deleteThread

      public void deleteThread(int id) throws SQLException
      Deletes a discussion thread by ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the thread to delete
      Throws:
      SQLException - if there is a database error

    • createReply

      public void createReply(int threadId, int parentReplyId, String content, String createdBy) throws SQLException
      Creates a reply to a specific discussion thread.
      Parameters:
      threadId - the ID of the thread
      parentReplyId - the ID of the parent reply (0 if direct to thread)
      content - the text content of the reply
      createdBy - the username of the reply creator
      Throws:
      SQLException - if there is a database error

    • getRepliesForThread

      public List<String> getRepliesForThread(int threadId)
      Gets all replies for a specific discussion thread.
      Parameters:
      threadId - the ID of the thread
      Returns:
      a List of formatted strings representing the replies

    • getThread

      public String getThread(int threadId)
      Retrieves a single thread's full details by its ID.
      Parameters:
      threadId - the ID of the thread
      Returns:
      a formatted string of the thread details, or null if not found

    • getStaffUsers

      public List<String> getStaffUsers()
      Retrieves all staff members for the dropdown menu.
      Returns:
      a List of usernames representing staff members

    • createDirectMessage

      public void createDirectMessage(String sender, String receiver, String content) throws SQLException
      Creates a direct message between two users.
      Parameters:
      sender - the username of the sender
      receiver - the username of the receiver
      content - the content of the message
      Throws:
      SQLException - if there is a database error

    • getDirectMessages

      public List<String> getDirectMessages(String user1, String user2)
      Retrieves direct messages between two specific users.
      Parameters:
      user1 - the first user's username
      user2 - the second user's username
      Returns:
      a List of formatted message strings between the two users

    • clearAllMessages

      public void clearAllMessages()
      Clears all existing direct messages from the database.

    • getStudentUsers

      public List<String> getStudentUsers()
      Retrieves all student members so Staff can message them.
      Returns:
      a List of usernames representing students

    • createQuestion

      public void createQuestion(String title, String topic, String createdBy)
      Creates a new question.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the question
      topic - the detailed topic of the question
      createdBy - the username of the creator

    • getQuestionList

      public List<String> getQuestionList()
      Retrieves a list of all questions.
      Returns:
      a List of formatted strings representing questions

    • getQuestion

      public String getQuestion(int id)
      Retrieves a specific question by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the question
      Returns:
      a formatted string representing the question, or null if not found

    • createQuestionReply

      public void createQuestionReply(int questionId, int parentReplyId, String content, String createdBy)
      Creates a reply to a question.
      Parameters:
      questionId - the ID of the question being replied to
      parentReplyId - the ID of the parent reply (0 if direct)
      content - the content of the reply
      createdBy - the username of the creator

    • getRepliesForQuestion

      public List<String> getRepliesForQuestion(int questionId)
      Gets all replies for a specific question.
      Parameters:
      questionId - the ID of the question
      Returns:
      a List of formatted strings representing the replies

    • hasReadPost

      public boolean hasReadPost(String username, int postId, String postType)
      Checks if a user has read a specific post.
      Parameters:
      username - the username of the reader
      postId - the ID of the post
      postType - the type of the post
      Returns:
      true if the post has been read, false otherwise

    • markPostAsRead

      public void markPostAsRead(String username, int postId, String postType)
      Marks a post as read for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      username - the username of the reader
      postId - the ID of the post
      postType - the type of the post

    • setupGradingAndTimestamps

      public void setupGradingAndTimestamps()
      Automatically updates the database schema safely to include grading and timestamps.

    • getTimestampStr

      public String getTimestampStr(int id, String table)
      Gets a formatted timestamp string for a record in a specific table.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the record
      table - the name of the table
      Returns:
      a formatted timestamp string or "Just now" as default

    • saveGrade

      public void saveGrade(int replyId, int wordScore, int qualityScore, int timeScore)
      Saves a grade for a specific reply.
      Parameters:
      replyId - the ID of the reply being graded
      wordScore - the score for the word count
      qualityScore - the score for the quality
      timeScore - the score for the time taken

    • getGrade

      public String getGrade(int replyId)
      Retrieves a grade for a specific reply.
      Parameters:
      replyId - the ID of the reply
      Returns:
      a formatted string of the grade scores, or null if not found

    • softDeleteThread

      public void softDeleteThread(int id)
      Soft deletes a thread by masking content.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the thread

    • softDeleteQuestion

      public void softDeleteQuestion(int id)
      Soft deletes a question by masking content.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the question

    • softDeleteReply

      public void softDeleteReply(int id)
      Soft deletes a reply by masking content.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the reply

    • softDeleteQuestionReply

      public void softDeleteQuestionReply(int id)
      Soft deletes a question reply by masking content.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the question reply

    • deleteQuestion

      public void deleteQuestion(int id)
      Permanently deletes a question from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the question

    • deleteReply

      public void deleteReply(int id)
      Permanently deletes a reply from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the reply

    • deleteQuestionReply

      public void deleteQuestionReply(int id)
      Permanently deletes a question reply from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the question reply

    • updateReply

      public void updateReply(int id, String newContent)
      Updates the content of an existing reply.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the reply
      newContent - the new content

    • updateQuestionReply

      public void updateQuestionReply(int id, String newContent)
      Updates the content of an existing question reply.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the question reply
      newContent - the new content

    • updateQuestion

      public void updateQuestion(int id, String newTitle, String newTopic)
      Updates the title and topic of an existing question.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the question
      newTitle - the new title
      newTopic - the new topic

    • deleteAllRepliesForThread

      public void deleteAllRepliesForThread(int threadId)
      Deletes all replies associated with a specific thread.
      Parameters:
      threadId - the ID of the thread

    • deleteAllRepliesForQuestion

      public void deleteAllRepliesForQuestion(int questionId)
      Deletes all replies associated with a specific question.
      Parameters:
      questionId - the ID of the question

    • getOrCreateGeneralThread

      public int getOrCreateGeneralThread()
      Gets the ID of the General thread, or creates it if it doesn't exist.
      Returns:
      the ID of the General thread

    • isTempAdmin

      public boolean isTempAdmin(String username)
      Checks if a user is a temporary admin and if their status is still active.
      Parameters:
      username - the username to check
      Returns:
      true if the user is an active temporary admin, false otherwise

    • submitAdminRequest

      public void submitAdminRequest(String username, String message)
      Submits a new admin request for a user.
      Parameters:
      username - the username submitting the request
      message - the justification message

    • resubmitAdminRequest

      public void resubmitAdminRequest(int id, String message)
      Resubmits an existing admin request.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the request
      message - the new message

    • acceptAdminRequest

      public void acceptAdminRequest(int id, String username, String notes)
      Accepts an admin request and grants temporary admin status for 24 hours.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the admin request
      username - the username to grant admin status to
      notes - the admin notes associated with the decision

    • denyAdminRequest

      public void denyAdminRequest(int id, String notes)
      Denies an admin request.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the admin request
      notes - the admin notes associated with the decision

    • updateAdminRequestNotes

      public void updateAdminRequestNotes(int id, String notes)
      Updates the notes for an admin request.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the request
      notes - the new notes

    • getAdminRequests

      public List<String> getAdminRequests(String statusFilter, String usernameFilter)
      Retrieves a list of admin requests, optionally filtered by status and username.
      Parameters:
      statusFilter - the status to filter by (e.g., "Pending", "Closed"), or null for all
      usernameFilter - the username to filter by, or null for all
      Returns:
      a List of formatted strings representing the requests

    • getListOfUsers

      public List<String> getListOfUsers()
      Retrieves a comprehensive list of all users and their roles.
      Returns:
      a List of strings formatting each user and their roles

    • generateOTP

      public String generateOTP(String roles, long durationMinutes)
      Generates a random One-Time Password (OTP) for the user.
      Parameters:
      roles - the roles associated with the OTP (currently unused in generation logic)
      durationMinutes - the duration the OTP is valid for (currently unused in generation logic)
      Returns:
      the randomly generated 6-character OTP string

    • deleteGrade

      public void deleteGrade(int replyId)
      Deletes a grade associated with a specific reply.
      Parameters:
      replyId - the ID of the reply whose grade should be deleted
